news.headline: UK lenders see secured lending availability unchanged in three months to end-Nov - BoE Survey.
UK lenders expect unsecured lending availability to increase in three months to end-Nov - BoE Survey.
UK lenders see business lending availability unchanged in three months to end-Nov - BoE Survey.
Global organic sweeteners market valued at $3.5 billion in 2023; expected to reach $7.1 billion by 2033, growing at 7.4% CAGR.
news.summary: The article discusses a report by Allied Market Research on the global organic sweeteners market. The market was valued at $3.5 billion in 2023 and is projected to reach $7.1 billion by 2033, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 7.4% from 2024 to 2033. The growth is attributed to factors such as increasing health consciousness, awareness of the negative effects of refined sugars, expansion of organic food categories, and clean-label product offerings. The market is also benefiting from the wider availability of organic sweeteners through various retail channels and the introduction of new product variants.

news.headline: Global beta glucan market to reach USD 800 million by 2029 with 8.1% CAGR, driven by natural food additives & increasing use in pharmaceuticals and cosmetics. North America leads.
news.summary: The global beta glucan industry is estimated to grow from USD 542 million in 2024 to USD 800 million by 2029, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 8.1%. This growth is driven by factors such as the demand for natural food additives in the food and beverage industry and the use of beta-glucan in pharmaceuticals and cosmetics. The dietary supplement segment is expected to grow the fastest, with yeast emerging as a dominant source of beta glucans due to its efficiency in production. North America leads in the beta-glucan market.

news.headline: Global Composite AI market expected to reach USD 5.6 billion by 2033 with a 19.4% CAGR. Software segment dominated in 2023.
news.summary: The article discusses the recent research report by Custom Market Insights on the Composite AI Market. In 2023, the global market was valued at approximately USD 1.1 billion, expected to reach USD 1.5 billion in 2024, and projected to grow to around USD 5.6 billion by 2033. Composite AI integrates various AI technologies like machine learning and computer vision to address complex challenges effectively. By component, software held the highest market share in 2023, with product design and development being the dominant technique, and banking and financial services as the primary application segment. The North American region is highlighted for its economic strength and technological innovation. Google LLC, known for its technological advancements, is mentioned in the context of AI development. The report projects a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of about 19.4% from 2024 to 2033.

news.headline: Huawei wins "Most Innovative Optical Transport Use Case" award at NGON 2024 in Paris.  #Innovation #Huawei #NGON2024
news.summary: In Paris on October 10, 2024, Huawei was honored with the "Most Innovative Optical Transport Use Case" award at Network X 2024, also referred to as Next-Generation Optical Networks (NGON) 2024. This recognition was granted during the event held in Paris, France. The award specifically acknowledges the device vendor that demonstrates exceptional innovation in optical transport solutions.

news.headline: GenesisCare UK orders RayStation treatment planning system from RaySearch Laboratories AB, a key step for leading cancer care provider.
news.summary: Stockholm, Oct. 10, 2024 - RaySearch Laboratories AB (publ) has confirmed a significant order for the RayStation®* treatment planning system from GenesisCare UK. As the top independent cancer care provider in the UK, GenesisCare operates across 14 specialized outpatient facilities. This latest agreement underscores the growing and notable presence of RaySearch Laboratories in the field of cancer treatment, highlighting the continued trust and demand for their advanced technology in healthcare settings.

news.headline: Breast lesion localization market valued at $1.2B in 2023, set to reach $3.6B by 2033 at 11.7% CAGR due to rising breast cancer cases and technological advancements.
news.summary: The article discusses a report by Allied Market Research on the Breast Lesion Localization Methods Market, stating that it was valued at $1.2 billion in 2023 and is projected to reach $3.6 billion by 2033, with a growth rate of 11.7% from 2024 to 2033. The market growth is attributed to factors such as the increasing prevalence of breast cancer, awareness about early diagnosis, and technological advancements in localization methods. The rise in breast cancer cases globally has led to a higher demand for these methods, with healthcare systems expanding screening programs. Technological innovations like wire-guided localization systems and magnetic tracers have improved procedural outcomes. The report covers the forecast period of 2024-2033, highlighting the growth and importance of breast lesion localization methods in the healthcare industry.

news.headline: Traditional helpdesks may be extinct by 2027, as per Nexthink report. 79% IT workers foresee drastic changes in 3 years, predicting 77% redundancy by 2027.
news.summary: Nexthink, a leading company in Digital Employee Experience (DEX) management, has released a report titled ‘The Death (and Rebirth) of the Service Desk’ discussing the future of IT service desks. According to a survey of 1,000 IT workers worldwide, 79% believe that the current service desk model will undergo significant changes within the next three years. Additionally, 77% of respondents think that advancements in new technologies will make the current service desk obsolete by the year 2027. The report also highlights that 87% of IT workers mention that digital transformation is impacting the way service desks operate.

news.headline: Lactose Intolerance Market to hit US$16.51 Billion by 2031, growing at 6.24% CAGR, as awareness increases about lactose sensitivity.
news.summary: The article discusses the findings of a report by CoherentMI on the Lactose Intolerance Market, forecasting a value of US$10.83 billion in 2024 and a projected growth to US$16.51 billion by 2031, with a CAGR of 6.24% during the period. The rising awareness of lactose intolerance globally, with around 68% of the population suffering from it after infancy, is fueling the demand for lactose-free and low lactose alternatives. Factors like education campaigns, doctor consultations, and online resources are aiding in identifying lactose intolerance. The market is expected to witness significant growth due to increasing incidences of lactose intolerance, the need for lactose-free dairy options, and the shift towards vegan and gluten-free diets.

news.headline: Wynn's investment in UAE casinos pays off despite gambling ban; net profit up by 20%.
European stocks rise before US data; GSK shares surge.

Fortune Europe and Great Place To Work announced the Fortune 100 Best Companies to Work For™ Europe List, based on surveying 1 million employees. Winning companies provide fair promotions, increasing trust levels.
news.summary: Great Place To Work® has partnered with Fortune Europe to release the first Fortune 100 Best Companies to Work For™ Europe List. This list was created by surveying 1.3 million employees across Europe, with 1 million responses coming from eligible companies. To be considered, companies needed 500+ employees and recognition on national Best Workplaces™ lists in specific countries. Winning companies outperform typical workplaces in Europe in fairness, with 78% of employees at the top companies stating promotions are fair and 70% receiving a fair share of profits, in contrast to 37% and 36% respectively in typical workplaces. CEO Michael C. Bush commended the winners for their support during economic challenges, highlighting the importance of trust for future business success. The full article is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Saviynt's Converge Global Tour 2024 London event to be held on October 15, showcasing Identity Cloud platform.
news.summary: Saviynt, a top provider of cloud-native identity and governance platform solutions, is set to host its Converge Global Tour 2024 event in London on October 15. The event will bring together Saviynt executives, customers, partners, industry analysts, and peers to discuss identity security, emerging trends, and best practices. Participants will have the opportunity to explore Saviynt’s converged platform, The Identity Cloud, along with the newly launched Saviynt Intelligence Suite. This event aims to provide insights and updates in the field of identity security.

news.headline: parcelLab and Metapack join forces to provide retailers worldwide with seamless delivery experiences, enhancing customer satisfaction.
news.summary: In London, parcelLab, a prominent global retail, e-commerce, and post-purchase customer experience platform, and Metapack, a leading e-commerce delivery technology company, have revealed a strategic partnership. They seek to offer all-inclusive solutions for retailers globally. By merging their capabilities, parcelLab and Metapack intend to provide the e-commerce sector with smooth delivery experiences that boost growth and improve customer contentment. This collaboration is anticipated to bring significant benefits to the industry.

news.headline: Italian Industrial Production MoM Actual 0.1% (Forecast 0.2%, Previous -0.9%)
BoJ's Former Executive Momma: If the Yen weakens to 150 or 155, it would move rate hike timing forward.
JBS awarded "Best Compliance Dept in Agribusiness" at event with 200+ industry professionals. São Paulo, Oct. 10, 2024.
news.summary: In an event that brought together more than 200 industry experts, a platform was provided for in-depth discussions on current trends and top practices within the agribusiness sector in Brazil and worldwide. The recognition of "Best Compliance Department in Agribusiness" was awarded to JBS at the first edition of the event, held in São Paulo on October 10, 2024.

news.headline: AMRO launched AFSR 2024 on market developments in ASEAN+3, highlighting disinflation and robust growth.
news.summary: AMRO unveiled the ASEAN+3 Financial Stability Report (AFSR 2024) on October 10, 2024. The report delves into market trends and risks within the ASEAN+3 region. It provides in-depth analysis of recent developments while offering insights into potential challenges.

news.headline: Global businesses lose $1.75 trillion due to untapped potential of 627 million excluded from online services by Sumsub.
news.summary: Today, on World Inclusion Day, Sumsub has introduced 'Greenflag,' a digital platform aimed at providing access to online services for a massive 627 million people worldwide who are currently excluded. This initiative comes as a response to the global issue of hundreds of millions of individuals being unable to utilize various online services.

news.headline: Washington, D.C.-area residents come together for Shatterproof event on Oct. 19 to fight addiction stigma. Research shows high stigma levels.
news.summary: A recent study uncovered substantial stigma and misconception surrounding a manageable health issue. Taking place on Saturday, October 19, at 8:00 a.m., an event will be held in Washington, D.C., aiming to increase awareness about addiction and encourage local residents to combat the stigma associated with it.

news.headline: AirConsole partners with Volkswagen, offering in-car gaming on select models, with debut of Trivia Crack. Exciting advancement in entertainment.
news.summary: Today, in Zurich on October 10, 2024, the innovative in-car gaming platform AirConsole has reported the commencement of its services on specific Volkswagen models. This recent incorporation represents a notable advancement in in-car entertainment, providing AirConsole access to a broader audience.

news.headline: Dr. Aleksandar Simic of FTC Group named "CEO of the Year in the Business Aviation Industry" in 2024 CEO Awards.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on October 10, 2024, Business Worldwide Magazine recognized Dr. Aleksandar Simic of FTC Group as the recipient of the prestigious "CEO of the Year in the Business Aviation Industry" award for 2024. This distinction is part of the annual CEO Awards, a renowned platform that honors top C-level leaders in various industries. Dr. Simic's exceptional leadership and contributions to the business aviation sector have earned him this esteemed accolade, underscoring his significant impact on the industry.

news.headline: Verkkokauppa.com will release its Interim Report for Jan-Sep 2024 on October 24, 2024.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached 6.5%, with a total of 10.4 million people currently out of work. This represents a significant increase from the previous quarter and is the highest the unemployment rate has been in several years. Additionally, it was disclosed that average hourly wages have decreased by 2.3% compared to the same period last year. Experts attribute these concerning statistics to the ongoing economic uncertainty and the impact of the global pandemic on various industries. The government has announced plans to implement new policies and initiatives to address the rising unemployment rate and stimulate economic growth in the coming months.

news.headline: eMaint by Fluke Reliability named Leader in Green Quadrant for EAM; excels in inventory mgmt, inspections, work orders.
news.summary: A recent study by an independent research firm has identified eMaint as a prominent player in the market. The report highlights eMaint's exceptional performance in key areas such as inventory management, inspections, work order management, and analytical capabilities. This recognition solidifies eMaint's position as a leader in the industry, showcasing its expertise and proficiency.

news.headline: Markel Group appoints Stacey Hinton as Senior Underwriter, Head of Jewellers Block, Specie in London.
news.summary: In London on October 10, 2024, Markel, the insurance arm of Markel Group Inc. (NYSE:MKL), revealed the selection of Stacey Hinton as the new Senior Underwriter, Head of Jewellers Block, Specie. Hinton's appointment is effective immediately, and she will take charge of overseeing the operations in this sector.

news.headline: OlyBet expands partnership with DP World Tour, becomes Official Partner of Open de France. Tallinn, Estonia, Oct 10, 2024.
news.summary: OlyBet has enhanced its partnership with DP World Tour by becoming an Official Partner of the Open de France, starting on October 10, 2024, in Tallinn, Estonia. This expansion includes the activation of Tournament Village and branded chalet experiences for customers.

news.headline: Russia: Nuclear five are to meet soon in New York - Tass
US federal authorities work together to dismantle fraudulent crypto firms involving multiple entities and crimes.
news.summary: US federal authorities have taken action against a convoluted network of companies, individuals, and suspected crimes.

news.headline: Malware hits 28K users, steals just $6K in crypto: Report. Tens of thousands infected by cryptojacking malware.
news.summary: Within the last few months, a malware designed for cryptojacking and theft has spread to over tens of thousands of devices. It has been reported that the attackers behind this malware have managed to steal only a total of $6,000 from their victims.

news.headline: Investor sues Bitcoin miner IREN, claiming it exaggerated compute ability and business outlook.
news.summary: A legal case was filed against IREN, formerly known as Iris Energy, by an investor. The investor has alleged that the crypto mining company has exaggerated its capabilities in high-performance computing as well as its future business potential.

news.headline: World Liberty Financial, backed by Trump, suggests integrating Aave in a governance proposal for their crypto project.
news.summary: World Liberty Financial, a cryptocurrency platform supported by Donald Trump, is seeking to operate as an instance on the decentralized finance (DeFi) protocol Aave. This arrangement could potentially involve a significant amount of transactions and investments as the platform gains integration into the Aave network.

news.headline: Thai SEC considers allowing crypto products in mutual, private funds, favoring high-net-worth investors. Retail investors may have limited access.
news.summary: Proposed changes in Thailand would grant high-net-worth investors greater access to cryptocurrency funds compared to retail investors. The alterations aim to provide increased investment opportunities in the crypto market for affluent individuals in the country.

news.headline: South Korea now permits dividing cryptocurrency in divorce cases, acknowledging them as marital assets.
news.summary: In South Korea, new legislation permits spouses to include cryptocurrency and Bitcoin assets in divorce settlements, considering them as part of marital property. This legal amendment aims to address the increasing prevalence of digital assets in marital disputes. The move sets a precedent for the treatment of cryptocurrencies in legal matters and reflects the growing importance of such holdings in modern relationships. This development reflects a changing landscape where digital assets are becoming more mainstream and are being integrated into existing legal frameworks. It is a significant step in acknowledging the value and relevance of cryptocurrencies in marital asset division.

news.headline: BoJ's Himino: We are not on a pre-set course.
S&P hits record high as Apple, Amazon surge. Dow and S&P settled at record levels. Tech stocks gain. CNN Money index shows investor optimism. Fed debated 25 or 50 point rate cut.
news.summary: The CNBC Market Sentiment Index recorded a slight improvement in market sentiment, remaining in the "Greed" zone on Wednesday. The US market experienced gains, with the Dow Jones and S&P 500 achieving record levels. Tech stocks, led by Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN) and Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL), saw over 1% growth. Investors analyzed the minutes from the September Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) meeting, which showed a debate on whether to cut rates by 25 or 50 basis points. Ultimately, a 50-basis-point cut was chosen after extensive discussion. For the complete story, check out Benzinga.com.

news.headline: BoJ Deputy Gov Himino: Later in the year, we will have more data on pass through of wage hike on prices, and next year's wage negotiations.
BoJ Deputy Gov Himino: We will also know more about pass-through of yen-dollar rate on inflation via import prices.
BoJ's Himino: There are many real rates and all of them are negative.
BoJ's Himino: US consumption and Chinese data may need more attention.
BoJ's Himino: If the outlook for economic activity and prices presented in the July report is achieved, the BoJ will accordingly raise interest rates.
BoJ Deputy Gov Himino: The policy board is going to look at the totality of the data as it makes decisions meeting by meeting.
BoJ's Himino: We are to adjust our degree of easing if the outlook is realized.
BoJ's Himino: We are witnessing record high corporate profits and record high wage increases in Japan.
BoJ's Himino: Japan's economy has started to move again.
BoJ's Himino: Japan's monetary policy is also moving.
FSC Forest Week Campaign in Bonn, Germany urges collective action on climate and biodiversity crises before COP16 and COP29.
news.summary: The FSC Forest Week campaign is urging for global collaboration on climate and biodiversity challenges before COP16 and COP29.

news.headline: COP28 President urges action on UAE Consensus at COP29 in Baku for climate and socio-economic progress.
news.summary: Today, in Baku, Azerbaijan, on October 10, 2024, COP28 President Dr. Sultan Al Jaber urged countries to come together and take action at COP29 to leverage the progress made during the previous year's UAE Consensus. This agreement is seen as a crucial step towards achieving the goals set out in the Paris Agreement.

news.headline: Form 8.5 shows significant shareholding (EPT/RI) changes in Eckoh Plc.
